(base) Lexuss-MacBook-Pro:~ chenlingzhi$ brew install mongodb-community
-bash: brew: command not found

Homebrew installed successfully but PATH not set. You need to add `eval "$(/opt/homebrew/bin/brew shellenv)"` to your shell config (.zshrc or .bash_profile), then reload shell. After that `brew` will work and you can install mongodb-community.
